description: Dependency automation for the tapout-ai monorepo: pnpm frontend, Gradle backend, GitHub Actions, and the pinned postgres image.

packageRules.description: Angular-coupled majors need manual approval via the dependency dashboard — frontend/AGENTS.md pins dependency majors to Angular 22.
One PR per Angular release train instead of one PR per package.
Bump the postgres image in compose.yaml and TestcontainersConfiguration.java together — they must stay in sync.

customManagers.description: Track the postgres image pinned as a string in the Testcontainers configuration.
